positive: A vaporwave-inspired scene: a chrome sports car driving down an infinite grid road at sunset. Neon pink and electric blue color scheme. Palm trees silhouetted against a glowing gradient sky. Synthwave aesthetic, retro-futurism, 80s Miami vibe.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, dirty, natural elements, grayscale
